### O76 ‚ÄĒ THE PACKET COVER: de Bruijn's hard direction, unconditional (two_prime_packet_cover)

`DeBruijnTwoPrime.two_prime_packet_cover` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry, by hand from O71's
double-slice): **every member of a vanishing subset of őľ_{p^(a+1)¬∑q^(b+1)} has its full
őľ_p-fiber in S or its full őľ_q-fiber in S.** Proof: if the p-fiber misses a point, the
double-slice forces the membership difference row ‚Č° 1 along the entire q-direction, so
the q-fiber is full ‚ÄĒ pure case analysis on O71.

This is the necessary half of de Bruijn's 1953 theorem at the subset level, now formal
and hypothesis-free. Honest scope: cover is necessary, NOT sufficient (overlapping
packets break the vanishing sum); the exact O70 law is the disjoint-decomposition
refinement ‚ÄĒ the remaining finite combinatorial step between cover and the full
characterization (and thence the discharge of O73's base hypotheses).

### O77 ‚ÄĒ DE BRUIJN 1953, COMPLETE: the full two-prime packet decomposition machine-checked

`DeBruijnTwoPrime.two_prime_packet_decomposition` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry, by hand):
**a finite subset of őľ_{p^(a+1)¬∑q^(b+1)} (p ‚Č† q primes, characteristic zero) with
vanishing sum IS a disjoint union of full őľ_p- and őľ_q-packets** ‚ÄĒ the `PacketUnion`
inductive built packet-by-packet, each peel disjoint from the rest by construction.

Proof: peeling induction over the O76 cover ‚ÄĒ a full prime packet sums to zero
(`prime_packet_sum_zero`, geometric series), so removing the packet supplied by the
cover dichotomy preserves the vanishing sum and strictly drops cardinality; strong
induction finishes. Plumbing: CRT box coordinates (box_pair_surj/inj), the
nonlinear-cancellation index arithmetic, and the new-Mathlib card_sdiff intersection
form.

This completes the de Bruijn third pillar END TO END: O68 engine ‚Üí O71 double-slice
(linear disjointness proven) ‚Üí O76 cover ‚Üí O77 decomposition. The t = 1 instance of the
O70 mixed-radix law is now an unconditional theorem; connecting PacketUnion to O73's
closure-hypothesis format (mechanical) makes the first rung of the mixed tower
unconditional. The mixed-radix program's three pillars are all formal.
### O90 ‚ÄĒ O87's recursion seed PROVEN IN FULL: packet divisibility below p^a IS a bounded-coefficient combination of rotated ő¶_{p^a}-packets (and conversely), the a ‚Č• 2 de Bruijn descent engine

O87 left the prime-power continuation as one named brick: column indicator differences of CRT fibers at a prime power, divisible by ő¶_{p^a} (C6: 100% at n = 12, 18, where the naive dichotomy fails 168/486), should be ‚Ą§-combinations of rotated ő¶_{p^a}-packets ‚ÄĒ with the degree bound on the quotient named as the smallest honest piece. This pass proves the WHOLE brick, both directions, over any nontrivial integral domain, with no primality needed on the packet side.

**Falsify-first probe (`probe_packet_quotient_coeffs.py`, exact integer arithmetic, exit 0):** exhaustive over all vanishing subsets at n = 12 (600 ordered column pairs) and n = 18 (2000 pairs): every difference divisible (O87 C6 re-verified), every quotient has deg < Q = p^(a‚ąí1), every quotient coefficient in {‚ąí1,0,1}, the quotient IS the bottom coefficient slice of d, and the rotated-packet combination reconstructs exactly. **The exact coefficient structure answered (the brief's question):** the realized quotients exhaust the FULL {‚ąí1,0,1}^Q cube (9/9 at 12, 27/27 at 18) ‚ÄĒ no further restriction exists. **Finding (a wrong control corrected mid-probe):** the bottom-slice identity R[s] = d[s], s < Q, holds for ANY quotient ‚ÄĒ the convolution against the packet's sparse support never reaches down ‚ÄĒ so the degree bound's only job is to make the bottom slice the WHOLE quotient; without deg d < p^a the shifts-<Q combination fails (d = ő¶¬∑X^Q). Exact census: the divisible {‚ąí1,0,1}-vectors of length p^a are EXACTLY {ő¶¬∑R : R ‚ąą {‚ąí1,0,1}^Q}, count 3^Q (9 of 81 at p^a = 4; 27 of 19683 at p^a = 9) ‚ÄĒ the bijection the Lean brick states, with non-divisible vectors witnessing divisibility load-bearing.

**Bricks (`PacketCombinationDivisibility.lean`, axiom-clean [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound] √ó11, 0 sorry, 0 warnings):**
* `quotient_natDegree_lt` ‚ÄĒ **the named degree bound**: d = packet¬∑R, d ‚Č† 0, natDegree d < p¬∑q ‚üĻ natDegree R < q (pure degree bookkeeping off natDegree packet = (p‚ąí1)¬∑q, no monic machinery ‚ÄĒ domain + leading-coefficient count).
* `packet_mul_coeff` + `quotient_coeff_eq_bottom` ‚ÄĒ the generic-ring slice convolution (LamLeungTwoPow's ‚Ąö-only lemma re-proven over any CommRing) and its i = 0 instance: the quotient is the bottom slice.
* `packet_dvd_combination` ‚ÄĒ **the headline**: packet ‚ą£ d, deg d < p¬∑q ‚üĻ d = ő£_{s<q} C(d.coeff s)¬∑X^s¬∑packet ‚ÄĒ combination coefficients are literally coefficients of d, so ANY coefficient bound transfers verbatim; `indicator_diff_packet_combination` instantiates at {‚ąí1,0,1} (the O87-named statement).
* `packet_dvd_of_slice_replication` + `packet_dvd_iff_slice_replication` ‚ÄĒ **the converse and the recursion-usable iff**: below degree p¬∑q, packet divisibility ‚üļ p-fold slice replication d.coeff(t¬∑q+s) = d.coeff s ‚ÄĒ the form the a ‚Č• 2 descent consumes (column data at level a becomes slice data at level a‚ąí1).
* `cyclotomic_prime_pow_eq_packet`, `cyclotomic_dvd_combination`, `indicator_diff_cyclotomic_combination` ‚ÄĒ the bricks restated verbatim on ő¶_{p^(a+1)} via `cyclotomic_prime_pow_eq_geom_sum`, landing exactly on the C6 surface.
* Non-vacuity with teeth: fired end-to-end at ‚Ąö on the probe's own realized quotient (1,‚ąí1) (d = 1‚ąíX+X¬≤‚ąíX¬≥, the {0,2}-vs-{1,3} column difference) and on the rotated packet X+X¬≥; `¬¨ packet ‚Ąö 2 2 ‚ą£ (1+X)` proven through the iff ‚ÄĒ the conclusion discriminates.

**Where the open core moves:** the three-step de Bruijn ledger now has its prime-power engine: O87's column differences at level a are, by this brick, bounded combinations whose coefficients are bottom-slice indicator data ‚ÄĒ i.e. the iff converts ő¶_{p^a}-divisibility into p-fold slice replication, exactly the descent from q-adic digit a to a‚ąí1. What remains for the full two-prime theorem (and the M31-domain capstone) is the WIRING: run the recursion down the digits inside `MixedRadixTower`'s conditional rungs (replace the level-a base hypotheses by this brick + induction) and assemble mixed disjoint packets at composite levels ‚ÄĒ bookkeeping plus the O67-verified mixed-decomposition census as the target shape, no new divisibility content needed at a single prime power.
### O91 ‚ÄĒ de Bruijn: the O79 splice LANDED + the squarefree classification completed to an EQUIVALENCE (sufficiency engine at every modulus)

Two complement bricks around the O87 disjointness landing, both queued by the in-tree ledger and neither stated anywhere on main: the O79 step-(1) entry's deferred splice ("composing the two yields the full two-prime subset-sum fiber slice with no hypothesis; deliberately not built this pass to avoid depending on an unlanded sibling file" ‚ÄĒ both siblings have since landed), and the SUFFICIENCY half of de Bruijn step (3) (O87 proved vanishing ‚üĻ closure; the packet cover proved per-element necessity; nothing proved closure ‚üĻ vanishing).

**Brick 1 (`CRTSubsetSumFiberSlice.lean`, axiom-clean [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound], 0 sorry, 0 warnings): the splice.**
* `vanishing_subset_sum_fiber_slice` ‚ÄĒ **the unconditional two-prime subset-sum fiber slice at general `p^a¬∑q^b`**: distinct primes `p ‚Č† q`, `0 < b`, `ő∂` a primitive `(p^a¬∑q^b)`-th root in ANY characteristic-zero field, `S ‚äÜ ZMod (p^a¬∑q^b)` with `‚ąĎ_{e‚ąąS} ő∂^e = 0` ‚üĻ the CRT-grid fiber sums `‚ąĎ_{j<p^a} [(j, i¬∑q^{b‚ąí1}+s) ‚ąą gridSet S]¬∑(ő∂^{q^b})^j` are independent of `i < q`. Steps (0)+(1)+(2) composed (`subset_sum_eq_grid_double_sum` + `crt_fiber_slice_coprimePrimePowers`); only the primitive root and the vanishing sum remain. (The O87 lane inlined this composition at `a = b = 1`; the general exponent-surface statement was still missing ‚ÄĒ it is the input shape for the `a¬∑b > 1` packet-combination recursion named open by O87.) Non-vacuity at a NONEMPTY vanishing sum (`n = 6`, `S = {1,4}`, `ő∂ + ő∂‚Āī = 0` over `‚Ąā`).

**Brick 2 (`DeBruijnSquarefreeIff.lean`, axiom-clean, 0 sorry, 0 warnings): the equivalence.**
* `sum_pow_val_eq_zero_of_addClosed` ‚ÄĒ **the shift engine, any modulus**: a subset of `ZMod n` closed under translation by `d` has vanishing sum against any `n`-th root `ő∂` with `ő∂^{d.val} ‚Č† 1` (translation is a bijection of S onto itself ‚üĻ the sum absorbs a factor `ő∂^{d.val}`). Consumes nothing about `n`'s factorization ‚ÄĒ the sufficiency mechanism at EVERY level of the de Bruijn program.
* `vanishing_of_addClosed_packet` ‚ÄĒ prime-power instantiation: in `ZMod (p^a¬∑q^b)`, closure under the packet step `+p^a¬∑q^{b‚ąí1}` (a union of rotated full őľ_q-packets) forces vanishing. The converse of the landed `two_prime_packet_cover` necessity, at the same generality.
* `debruijn_squarefree_two_prime_iff` ‚ÄĒ **the capstone equivalence at squarefree `n = p¬∑q`**: `‚ąĎ_{e‚ąąS} ő∂^e = 0 ‚üļ S` is `+p`-closed or `+q`-closed. Forward = O87's `debruijn_squarefree_two_prime`; backward = the shift engine at `d = p, q` (`ő∂^p ‚Č† 1 ‚Č† ő∂^q` by primitivity). De Bruijn 1953 for `{0,1}` coefficients at squarefree two-prime `n` is now a two-sided theorem.
* Witnesses with teeth: `ő∂ + ő∂‚Āī = 0` over `‚Ąā` falls out of a kernel-`decide`d `+3`-closure check on `{1,4} ‚äÜ ZMod 6` (no root-of-unity manipulation), and the forward direction fires end-to-end on the same nonempty set.

**Falsify-first probe (`scripts/probes/probe_debruijn_squarefree.py`, exact ‚Ą§[x]/ő¶_n arithmetic ‚ÄĒ vanishing tested by exact division by the cyclotomic, fiber sums reduced in ‚Ą§[x]/ő¶_{p^a} ‚ÄĒ exit 0):** the equivalence EXHAUSTIVE over all 2^n subsets at n = 6, 10, 15 (10/34/38 vanishing sets, 0 mismatches), 30,000 sampled + adversarial (pure-with-one-point-toggled ‚ÄĒ the toggles never vanish, so sufficiency has teeth) at n = 21, 35 (5,000 vanishing each, 0 mismatches). The splice exhaustive at n = 12, 18, 15, 20 and sampled+planted at n = 36, 0 violations, with teeth: 1,047,420 of the 2^20 non-vanishing subsets at n = 20 violate the invariance. CONTROL re-confirmed: at non-squarefree n = 12 the set {0,6} ‚ą™ {1,5,9} vanishes but satisfies NEITHER closure ‚ÄĒ squarefree-ness is load-bearing in the iff exactly as O87 measured.

**Literature note (this session's sweep, June 2026):** no public Lean/Isabelle/mathlib formalization of de Bruijn 1953 or Lam‚ÄďLeung exists (GitHub code search + web) ‚ÄĒ the in-tree ledger (O66‚ÜíO91) appears to be the first machine-checked de Bruijn-type theory of vanishing sums of roots of unity. (Adjacent: arXiv 2008.11268, updated Dec 2025, classifies minimal vanishing sums to weight ‚Č§ 21 ‚ÄĒ weight-bounded, not subset-shaped.)

**Where the de Bruijn frontier sits now:** with O77 (the full `PacketUnion` decomposition on the value surface) and O90 (the packet-combination descent engine) landed in parallel, the necessity side of de Bruijn is complete at every `p^a¬∑q^b`; these two bricks supply the EXPONENT-surface (`ZMod`) statements the consumers use ‚ÄĒ the general-`(a,b)` fiber slice and the squarefree two-sided equivalence ‚ÄĒ plus the factorization-free sufficiency engine (the O76 cover entry records that cover alone does NOT imply vanishing; shift-closure does). Remaining mechanical step, named by O77: wire `PacketUnion` into O73's (`MixedRadixTower`) closure-hypothesis format to make the conditional tower's first rung unconditional.

### O79 ‚ÄĒ THE Q-POWER DESCENT: the q-packet spectrum drops one level (the windowed engine)

`DeBruijnTwoPrime.packetUnion_qpow_descent` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry): on any PacketUnion,
ő£_{y‚ąąS} y^q = q ¬∑ ő£_{r‚ąąR} r where R is a COLLISION-FREE spectrum (each r the common
q-th power of a full őľ_q-orbit inside S). őľ_p-packets die at exponent q (the twisted
packet sum, ŌČ_p^q still primitive ‚ÄĒ pow_of_coprime); őľ_q-packets each contribute q¬∑z^q
(rep power is j-independent: ő∂q^{q^{b+1}} = 1); collisions are impossible by the ORBIT
ARGUMENT (equal q-th powers differ by a q-th root of unity, which would place the new
rep inside an old packet ‚ÄĒ contradicting peel disjointness).

Consequence (char 0): a window condition at exponent q forces ő£_R r = 0 ‚ÄĒ the spectrum
R is a vanishing subset of őľ_{p^(a+1)¬∑q^b}, ONE q-LEVEL DOWN, and the de Bruijn
decomposition applies again. This is the recursion engine of the windowed two-prime law
(O70): windows kill őľ_q-packets level by level, exactly as the verified law predicts.
The remaining assembly: iterate the descent b+1 times and stack with the p-side climb ‚ÄĒ
mechanical given this engine + O77/O78.

### O91 ‚ÄĒ the squarefree pq classification goes TWO-SIDED: the iff, the packet-union representation, and the cardinality law (sibling to O87)

O87 closed step (3) at `a¬∑b = 1` in forward shift-closure form. This pass lands the COMPLEMENT ‚ÄĒ the full equivalence and the representation API (`DeBruijnSquarefreePQ.lean`, axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, 0 sorry):

* `vanishing_combination_const` / `subset_sum_rigidity` ‚ÄĒ the rigidity engine in trichotomy form: a vanishing ‚Ąö-combination of `1,őĺ,‚Ä¶,őĺ^{p‚ąí1}` has all coefficients equal (`minpoly.dvd` + degree pinch against `ő¶_p`, coefficient extraction through `C¬∑X^j`), hence two subsets of `őľ_p` with equal sums are EQUAL or `{‚ąÖ, őľ_p}` ‚ÄĒ stated with both degenerate witnesses explicit, the form the fiber case-split consumes directly.
* `grid_vanishing_iff_pure` ‚ÄĒ **the classification as an IFF on the CRT grid**: for `I ‚äÜ [0,p) √óňĘ [0,q)`, the double sum vanishes ‚üļ `I = A √óňĘ [0,q)` or `I = [0,p) √óňĘ T`. Forward = O83 fiber-slice invariance at `a = b = 1` + rigidity; CONVERSE = the geometric-sum factorization (`IsPrimitiveRoot.geom_sum_eq_zero`), which O87 did not state.
* `vanishing_subset_sum_iff_pure_packets` / `vanishing_subset_sum_iff_packet_union` ‚ÄĒ the headline iffs through the O82 bijection, the latter in exponent space: `S` vanishes ‚üļ `S` IS the `gridMap`-image of a pure product ‚ÄĒ a disjoint union of rotated `őľ_q`-packets or of rotated `őľ_p`-packets. Transport lemmas `image_gridMap_gridSet` (reconstruction: `gridMap '' gridSet S = S`) and `gridSet_image_gridMap` (`gridSet (gridMap '' J) = J` for grid subsets `J`) make the two surfaces interchangeable for downstream consumers.
* `card_of_vanishing_subset_sum` ‚ÄĒ **Lam‚ÄďLeung at `pq` with structure**: `q ‚ą£ |S| ‚ą® p ‚ą£ |S|`, the witnessing multiple counting whole packets.

Falsified first (`scripts/probes/probe_debruijn_squarefree_pq.py`, exact `‚Ą§[x]/ő¶_n`, exit 0): rigidity exhaustive at `p ‚ąą {3,5,7,11,13}` (all `2^p` subsets, the ONLY collision is `‚ąÖ` vs full); the iff exhaustive at `n = 6` (10 vanishing = `2¬≤ + 2¬≥ ‚ąí 2`, all pure) and `n = 15` (all `2^15`; 38 = `2¬≥ + 2‚ĀĶ ‚ąí 2`); `n = 35`: all `2‚ĀĶ + 2‚Ā∑` pure forms vanish + 200k random + 2k single-toggle adversarial non-pure subsets all non-vanishing. The census counts matching `2^p + 2^q ‚ąí 2` exactly is the converse made visible.

**Literature pin (research lane, full annotated report posted to #232):** the forward `pq` content is de Bruijn 1953 ¬ß3, modern proof = Lam‚ÄďLeung J. Algebra 224 (2000) Thm 3.3 (the double-slice argument the in-tree engine reproduces) with Cor 3.4 the minimality classification; the `p^a q^b` multiset-disjointness phrasing is Malikiosis arXiv:2005.05800 Thm 5.2. **No formalization of any of this theory exists outside this tree** (mathlib4, Isabelle/AFP, Coq searched 2026-06-09). The O70 `t > 1` window law is NOT in the literature (closest: Kumar‚ÄďSenthil Kumar single-‚Ąď power sums, arXiv:1503.07281, weights only) ‚ÄĒ it is an original observation; recommended proof route = peeling lemma + p-power compression. **Load-bearing warning** (Kiss‚ÄďŇĀaba‚ÄďMarshall‚ÄďSomlai arXiv:2507.11672, Thm 1.3/Prop 8.2): prescribed cyclotomic divisibility at an ARBITRARY scale set does NOT force packet structure even at two primes (counterexample at `M = 2‚ĀĻ3‚Ā∂`, 7 scales, beats every fibered configuration) ‚ÄĒ any window-law proof MUST use the downward-closedness of `{g : g ‚Č§ t}` (the BCH/consecutive-zeros structure); the generalization from windows to arbitrary divisor prescriptions is FALSE.

### O80 ‚ÄĒ THE SPECTRAL SYNDROME TRANSFER: the full window descends in one theorem

`DeBruijnTwoPrime.packetUnion_spectral_transfer` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry): ONE spectrum R
carries the ENTIRE syndrome window ‚ÄĒ for EVERY exponent e with p ‚ą§ e,

    ő£_{y‚ąąS} y^{q¬∑e} = q ¬∑ ő£_{r‚ąąR} r^e.

keeps R collision-free. Consequence: a window of S at {q¬∑e : e ‚Č§ w, p ‚ą§ e} is a window
of R at {e ‚Č§ w, p ‚ą§ e} one q-level down ‚ÄĒ THE complete recursion step of the windowed
two-prime law. The full windowed law is now: iterate (b+1 times), apply the prime-power
endpoint (O66), and stack the p-side climb ‚ÄĒ every ingredient machine-checked.

### O81 ‚ÄĒ THE ITERATED SPECTRAL TRANSFER: the full descent chain assembled

`DeBruijnTwoPrime.iterated_spectral_transfer` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry): given the q-power
window ő£_S y^{q^c} = 0 (1 ‚Č§ c ‚Č§ b), for EVERY depth m ‚Č§ b+1 the m-th spectrum R_m
exists at level őľ_{p^(a+1)¬∑q^(b+1‚ąím)} ‚ÄĒ every element a q^m-th power of an S element ‚ÄĒ
carrying the whole window with factor q^m:

    (q : F)^m ¬∑ ő£_{r‚ąąR_m} r^e = ő£_{y‚ąąS} y^{q^m¬∑e}   for every p ‚ą§ e.

Induction stacking O77 (decompose at each level ‚ÄĒ vanishing from the previous transfer
at e = 1 + the window; char-0 division by q^m) and O80 (one more transfer); level
bookkeeping via b+1‚ąím = (b‚ąím)+1 and ő∂q^{q^m} primitivity. At m = b+1 the chain bottoms
out in őľ_{p^(a+1)} ‚ÄĒ the prime-power level where Lam‚ÄďLeung (O66) takes over.

THE DESCENT HALF OF THE WINDOWED TWO-PRIME LAW IS COMPLETE. Remaining for the full law:

### O94 ‚ÄĒ the per-locus structure theorem: low-weight errors live in locator-divisible slice spaces (nubs, 2026-06-10)

`FoldPolynomialSlices.lean` extended (six new theorems, axiom-clean, 0 warnings ‚ÄĒ
pushed-diff verified against this claim):

  locator-divisible slices recompose to `2¬∑f`.

**What this pins formally:** the list-relevant f's of weight w are parameterized, per

weight filter IS the surviving counting question (O70's frontier). Iterating down the
tower multiplies the constraints: each level divides out another locator. Next named
step: the union/incidence count ‚ÄĒ how many loci can a single f serve, and the
finite-field cardinality corollary `#{f : slices vanish on Z} = q^{max(0, k‚ąí2|Z|)}`.

### O94 ‚ÄĒ DE BRUIJN 1953 TWO-PRIME LANDED IN FULL: the final assembly is a theorem ‚ÄĒ ő£_{e‚ąąS} ő∂^e = 0 at n = p^a¬∑q^b IFF S is a disjoint union of rotated full prime packets (the iff, both directions, axiom-clean)

O93 closed with exactly two named residuals: the lift lemma + the strong induction wrapper. This pass ships both and the headline they were for ‚ÄĒ Theorem de Bruijn 1953 (two-prime case, indicator form, sharpened to disjoint unions) as ONE in-tree statement.

**Falsify-first probe (`probe_debruijn_two_prime_assembly.py`, exact ‚Ą§[x]/ő¶_n meet-in-the-middle over the FULL 2^n mask space, exit 0, 20/20):** the headline iff as a set identity ‚ÄĒ the disjoint-canonical-packet-union family EQUALS the vanishing family ‚ÄĒ EXHAUSTIVELY at n = 12, 18, 20, 28 (counts 100/1000/1156/16900, matching O87/O67/O93 censuses); the recursion executed on every vanishing mask with the EXACT lift index map asserted at every lift of every level (the brief's "careful" item, pinned: canonical packets {s + t¬∑(m/d) : t < d} with base s < m/d lift through e ‚Ü¶ r + u¬∑e to base r + u¬∑s < u¬∑(m/d) = (u¬∑m)/d ‚ÄĒ canonical form survives descent, NO mod-n arithmetic exists anywhere in the development); mixture witnesses at every composite point (both packet types in one decomposition ‚ÄĒ pure type genuinely fails past squarefree, so the mixed statement is the honest one); toggle/singleton controls flip both sides together.

**Bricks (`DeBruijnTwoPrimeAssembly.lean`, axiom-clean [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound] √ó7, 0 sorry, 0 warnings, 553 lines):**
* `IsPacket` / `IsPacketUnion` ‚ÄĒ the canonical packet predicate (base < step = n/d, d teeth) and the disjoint-union decomposition; `IsPacket.card_eq` (packets have exactly d elements, the teeth engine).
* `packet_sum_eq_zero` / `sum_eq_zero_of_isPacketUnion` ‚ÄĒ **the converse, generic**: any packet dies against any primitive n-th root (ő∂^r¬∑ő£_{t<d}(ő∂^{n/d})^t, `geom_sum_eq_zero`), hence any disjoint union does (`Finset.sum_biUnion`). No two-prime structure needed.
* `isPacket_lift` ‚ÄĒ **the lift lemma (O93 residual 1)**: the image of a canonical d-packet at level m under e ‚Ü¶ r + u¬∑e (r < u) is a canonical d-packet at level u¬∑m ‚ÄĒ `Finset.image_image` + `Nat.mul_div_assoc`, the probe's index map verbatim.
* `isPacketUnion_of_closure` ‚ÄĒ **the squarefree seam**: S ‚äÜ [0, w¬∑k) closed under e ‚Ü¶ (e+k) % n IS a disjoint union of canonical step-k packets, one per residue of S mod k (the orbit argument: iterate closure j = w + t ‚ąí e/k times to wrap exactly once).
* `isPacketUnion_of_threads` ‚ÄĒ **the induction step**: if every thread T_r = {e' < m : r + u¬∑e' ‚ąą S} decomposes at level m, S decomposes at level u¬∑m ‚ÄĒ lift each thread's packets (lift lemma), cross-thread disjointness by residues mod u (`Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left`), non-dependent choice via guarded ‚ąÉ.
* `isPacketUnion_of_sum_eq_zero` ‚ÄĒ **the strong induction wrapper (O93 residual 2)**: nested induction (p-digits to a = 1, then q-digits to b = 1); each descent = O93 `thread_vanishing_of_vanishing` + IH at ő∂^u + thread assembly; the base = O87 `debruijn_squarefree_two_prime` pulled through the ‚Ąē‚ÜĒZMod bridges (`sum_image_cast`, `closure_nat_of_closure_zmod`) into the closure seam.
* `debruijn_two_prime` ‚ÄĒ **the headline iff**, exactly the brief's target shape (O92 layer-B census as a theorem).
* Teeth at ‚Ąā, n = 2¬≤¬∑3: converse PRODUCES 1 + ő∂‚āĀ‚āā‚Ā∂ = 0 from a decide-checked one-packet decomposition; forward converts hypothetical vanishing of {0} into a card contradiction (packets need ‚Č• 2 elements inside a singleton) ‚ÄĒ the iff discriminates.

**Where the open core moves:** the three-step de Bruijn ledger (O73 ‚Üí O87 ‚Üí O90 ‚Üí O92 ‚Üí O93 ‚Üí here) is CLOSED at two primes ‚ÄĒ vanishing 0/1 sums of p^a¬∑q^b-th roots of unity are completely classified in-tree, the first formalization of this theorem in any proof assistant (per the O91 search). What remains beyond it is genuinely new mathematics, not assembly: (i) THREE-plus prime moduli (de Bruijn's conjecture territory ‚ÄĒ false in general by Lam‚ÄďLeung; the honest target is the Lam‚ÄďLeung ‚Ąē-span theorem |S| ‚ąą ‚Ąēp + ‚Ąēq + ‚Ä¶, whose two-prime case is now a corollary of this brick via `IsPacket.card_eq`); (ii) the t > 1 window law (O70) at composite n, which no literature covers; (iii) wiring this classification into the M31-domain capstone consumers (the original #232 motivation: Mersenne-31 has n = 2^a¬∑3^b-style smooth subgroups ‚ÄĒ the two-prime case is exactly the M31 smooth-subgroup regime).

### O95 ‚ÄĒ THE O94 CLASSIFICATION LANDS ON THE TOWER SURFACE: the t=1 stratum of the mixed-radix law unconditional in tower language + the M31 smooth domain (nubs, 2026-06-10)

**Inventory (the consumers, measured exactly).** The 2-power capstone chain is O53 `full_tower` (power-sum window `j < 2^s` ‚üĻ `őľ_{2^s}`-closure) feeding O61 `unit_syndrome_list_budget`. Its two-prime analogue is the O70 divisor-coset law (window `t` ‚üĻ disjoint rotated `őľ_d`-cosets, `d ‚ą£ n`, `d > t`), whose closure consequence at `t ‚Č• q^b` is exactly the `hBasep/hBaseq` family of `MixedRadixTower.two_prime_tower_conditional` (O73). ### O97 ‚ÄĒ the level-1 union bound: the incidence template, machine-checked (nubs, 2026-06-10)

`SliceLocusCount.lean`: `low_weight_count_le` ‚ÄĒ for a negation-closed domain (char ‚Č† 2,
`0 ‚ąČ D`), with `s = |D¬≤| ‚ąí w`, `2s ‚Č§ k`:

    #{f : deg f < k, weight ‚Č§ w}  ‚Č§  C(|D¬≤|, s) ¬∑ q^(k ‚ąí 2s).

Proof = the now-complete level-1 pipeline composed end-to-end: every low-weight `f`
forces a dead locus of size ‚Č• s (O94 structure theorem), it contains a size-s sub-locus
(subsets of dead loci are dead), and each per-locus space counts exactly `q^(k‚ąí2s)`
(O96 capstone); union over `C(|D¬≤|, s)` loci.

HONEST SCOPE: as a pure number this is classically subsumed (RS is MDS; weight
distributions are exact via MacWilliams) ‚ÄĒ and the classical exactness does NOT resolve
the list question (lists are cliques around an arbitrary word, not balls at 0), so
neither does this bound alone. Its value: (1) the first machine-checked
weight-distribution-type bound through the slice route, (2) the TEMPLATE every tower
level instantiates ‚ÄĒ the iterated version's gain must come from cross-level interaction
of the loci (the genuinely open incidence), and now every ingredient of that sentence is
a formal object in-tree. Level-1 story complete: structure (O94) + per-slice count (O95)
+ f-level equality (O96) + union bound (this). Next frontier, named precisely: the
incidence/clique structure ‚ÄĒ pairwise difference loci of LIST configurations (around a
word, not 0) and the cross-level locus interaction down the tower.

The *pure size-kill law*: `őľ_d` survives the window iff `d > t`. The `t = 1` instance recovers O94; every `t > 1` is new (no literature statement covers the dense-window fiber at composite `n`). Step `t ‚Üí t+1`: `isPacket_pow_sum_eq_zero` (geometric kill at `d ‚ą§ j`) annihilates every `d > t+1` coset; the survivors contribute `(t+1)¬∑ő£_{bases} (ő∂^{t+1})^r` over DISTINCT bases (the base of a canonical coset is `e % (n/(t+1))` for any of its elements; disjointness ‚üĻ distinct bases ‚ÄĒ multiplicities never appear); the level classifier breaks the bases into prime packets at level `n/(t+1)`; `isPacket_merge` reassembles each base-packet's fattened cosets into ONE canonical `őľ_{(t+1)d'}`-coset.
* **`LevelDecomposes` interface**: the induction wrapper `windowed_law` is modulus-agnostic ‚ÄĒ it consumes "vanishing subset sums at every divisor level ‚Č• 2 decompose into prime packets", discharged at two-prime smooth moduli by `levelDecomposes_of_dvd_two_prime` (O94 at two-prime levels, O92 at prime-power levels through the ZMod bridges). A future level classification at 3+-prime moduli inherits the full windowed law with zero extra work ‚ÄĒ note this CANNOT be the packet form (O105 refutation); the right 3-prime interface is the open question.
* Teeth at ‚Ąā (n = 12, t = 3): őľ‚āĄ-coset {0,3,6,9} kills the whole window via .mpr; őľ‚āā-coset {0,6} refuted for window 3 via .mp (cardinality pinch).

### O107 ‚ÄĒ the 0/1 WEIGHT SPECTRUM of the BCH-window (dual-RS) code on smooth two-prime domains: exact, sharp, strictly past BCH between divisors

Consumer (i) named by O106, executed. `DeBruijnWindowedLaw.lean` +121 lines (5 new theorems, all axiom-clean, 0 sorry, 0 warnings, pushed dedd402ce):

* `IsWindowCosetUnion.card_eq_sum` ‚ÄĒ **the weight spectrum**: every window-`t`-vanishing weight is a sum of divisors of `n` exceeding `t` (the multiset of coset sizes; `card_biUnion` over the decomposition).
* `IsWindowCosetUnion.le_card_of_nonempty` + `window_min_weight_sharp` ‚ÄĒ **the exact minimum weight**: nonempty window-vanishing sets have `‚Č• d‚āÄ` elements for `d‚āÄ` = any lower bound on divisors `> t`, and every divisor `> t` is achieved (base-0 canonical coset). So the minimum 0/1-codeword weight of the cyclic code with zeros `ő∂,‚Ä¶,ő∂^t` on a two-prime-smooth domain is EXACTLY the least divisor of `n` exceeding `t`.
* `window_weight_spectrum_two_prime` / `window_min_weight_two_prime` ‚ÄĒ instantiations through O106's iff.

### O109 ‚ÄĒ the INCIDENCE CENSUS: level-1 Conjecture-D slack is CLASSICAL (MDS enumerator exact), the coset union bound is interpolation-dominated, and lists stay floor-trivial until capacity‚ąí2 (nubs, 2026-06-10)

Two probes landed (`scripts/probes/probe_slice_product_count.py`, `probe_locus_incidence_census.py`, both exit 0, exact GF(q) arithmetic), measuring the O99-named "union-over-loci/incidence structure versus the weight filter" from both sides:

* **CENSUS 1 (the weight filter has a CLOSED FORM at level 1):** the exact count `N(w) = #{f : deg<k, wt_D(f)=w}` matches the classical MDS weight-distribution formula `A_w = C(n,w)¬∑ő£_j (‚ąí1)^j C(w,j)(q^{w‚ąíd+1‚ąíj}‚ąí1)` EXACTLY at every `(q,n,k,w)` tested (q=17, n‚ąą{8,16}, k‚ąą{2,3,4}; q=13, n=12; q=257, n=16) ‚ÄĒ RS on the smooth subgroup domains is MDS and the level-1 union-over-loci question is therefore CLASSICAL, not open. The O99 slack is now exactly quantified: the slice union bound SU overshoots `N‚Č§(w)` by tabulated ratios (equality only at `w ‚ąą {0, n}`), and the plain zero-locus union bound CU is tighter than SU at every interior weight tested. The level-1 fold adds NO counting power over classical interpolation ‚ÄĒ the genuine Conjecture-D content is strictly at tower level ‚Č• 2.
* **CENSUS 2 (the open object ‚ÄĒ coset/list incidence):** over 54 received words per setup (structured deep-hole-ish + random), per-coset list sizes obey: `‚Ąď(u,w) = 0` strictly PAST the Johnson radius up to `w ‚Čą capacity‚ąí2` (e.g. q=17, n=16, k=4: Johnson = 8.0, lists empty through w=9); `max_u ‚Ąď` first crosses `n` at `w = capacity‚ąí1¬Ī1` and `n¬≤` only at capacity. The affine per-locus occupancy in the over-constrained regime matches the random-function prediction `1‚ąíexp(‚ąíq^(k‚ąí2z))` (generic EMPTINESS of coset slice spaces ‚ÄĒ the union bound is structurally loose on cosets); incidence multiplicity of genuine list elements is tiny (‚Č§ 5 loci served, |P| histogram concentrated at 1‚Äď3).
* **Verdict + named next:** (1) level-1 slice/locus geometry is fully classical ‚ÄĒ retire it as an open direction; (2) the surviving Conjecture-D content is the TOWER ITERATION (level-‚Č•2 fold constraints multiplying down the 2-adic chain ‚ÄĒ no census exists yet); (3) the floor-triviality of coset lists until capacity‚ąí2 on smooth domains is the empirical shadow of where őī* sits at toy scale ‚ÄĒ every sampled word, structured or random, is list-trivial through the entire Johnson‚Üí(capacity‚ąí2) band. Caveat honestly: n ‚Č§ 16, q ‚Č§ 257 ‚ÄĒ toy scale, no asymptotic claim.

### O111 ‚ÄĒ the WINDOW FIBER-COUNT LAW pinned at set level: F_n(t) ‚ČÖ F_m(t)^(n/m) with the exact block-trace bijection (probe layer; nubs, 2026-06-10)

O107's named next (ii) executed at the probe layer (`scripts/probes/probe_fiber_count_law.py` + `probe_window_fiber_threads.py`, both exit 0, pure coset combinatorics ‚ÄĒ by O106 the fiber family needs no roots of unity):

* **The exact bijection shape, pinned:** with `Dmin` = the divisibility-minimal divisors of `n` exceeding `t`, `m = lcm(Dmin)` (`m ‚ą£ n`), `g = n/m`: block `c < g` is the residue class `{e : e ‚Č° c mod g}`, the trace is `T_c(S) = {e/g : e ‚ąą S, e ‚Č° c}` ‚äÜ `[0, m)`, and `S ‚ąą F_n(t) ‚üļ ‚ąÄ c < g, T_c(S) ‚ąą F_m(t)` ‚ÄĒ bijectively, hence `|F_n(t)| = |F_m(t)|^(n/m)`. * `window_mass_span_two_prime` ‚ÄĒ **the windowed span law**: at `n = p^a¬∑q^b` (char 0), any window-`t`-vanishing `w : ‚Ąē ‚Üí ‚Ąē` has `ő£_{e<n} w_e ‚ąą ‚Ąē-span{d : d ‚ą£ n, t < d}`.

* `window_mass_in_prime_span` ‚ÄĒ **the O104 upgrade**: for EVERY window length `t ‚Č• 1`, mass ‚ąą `‚Ąē¬∑p + ‚Ąē¬∑q` (each divisor `> t ‚Č• 1` is a multiple of `p` or `q`; O104 is the `t = 1` case).

### O109 ‚ÄĒ the general-arity program: the converse half PROVED at every modulus; the forward peel fully designed and gated

**Landed (`GeneralPacketCombination.lean`, axiom-clean √ó2):** `packet_combination_vanishes` + `rat_packet_combination_vanishes` ‚ÄĒ at EVERY `n` (no squarefree hypothesis, ‚Ąē- and ‚Ąö-weights): `w e = ő£_{p ‚ąą primeFactors n} A p (e % (n/p)) ‚üĻ ő£_{e<n} w_e¬∑ő∂^e = 0` ‚ÄĒ every prime-fiber component carries its prime's full geometric sum. The general-arity classification's easy half, at maximal generality (the ‚Ąö form re-runs the O101 regroup at base `n/p` inline since `packet_part_eq_zero` is ‚Ąē-cast).

**Gated (the forward at squarefree n, the arity induction ‚ÄĒ design complete, dimension- and route-checked, NOT claimed):** strong induction on n. ### O115 ‚ÄĒ the LEVEL-2 TOWER CENSUS: the tower iteration adds ZERO counting power (forced level-2 loci are exactly the antipodal pairs of Z‚āĀ), and the surviving level-2 law is a level-1 reduction (W2-D harvest; nubs, 2026-06-10)

`scripts/probes/probe_tower_level2_census.py` (exit 0, deterministic, exact GF(q); exhaustive 83,521 f at (17,16,4) + 300k samples + all 65,536 joint profiles + 6.65M coset elements; full findings in the header docstring). Level-‚Ąď forcing needs `w < n/2^‚Ąď` ‚ÄĒ the tower dies geometrically strictly below Johnson (n/4 < n‚ąí‚ąö(nk) whenever k < 9n/16).
* **The POSITIVE law (formalizable, verified on all joint profiles)**: with merged sets `S_e = Z‚āĀ ‚ą™ ‚ąöZ‚āāe`, `S_o = Z‚āĀ ‚ą™ ‚ąöZ‚āāo`: `#{f : deg < k, slices vanish on Z‚āĀ, level-2 loci ‚äá Z‚āāe/Z‚āāo} = q^(max(0,‚Ćąk/2‚ĆČ‚ąí|S_e|) + max(0,‚Ćäk/2‚Ćč‚ąí|S_o|))` ‚ÄĒ an exact q-power, but a REDUCTION to level 1 (`recompose_slices` + `card_polysDegLT_vanishing` at the merged sets ‚ÄĒ no new machinery). Dimensions multiply iff `‚ąöZ‚āā ‚ą© Z‚āĀ = ‚ąÖ`; each overlap refunds one dimension. Weight ‚Č§ w forces `‚ąöZ‚āā ‚äÜ Z‚āĀ`, hence the level-2 union bound is TERMWISE ‚Č• O99's level-1 bound.
* Coset lists reproduce O109 (floor-trivial through capacity‚ąí2); level-2 thins nothing in the band.

**Verdict for Conjecture D:** level ‚Č• 2 content must come from incidence/inclusion‚Äďexclusion over locus overlaps or genuinely non-forced anticorrelation structure ‚ÄĒ NOT from multiplying per-level forced budgets. Both named survivors are now sharply delimited. Caveat: toy scale (n ‚Č§ 16, q ‚Č§ 257), but the domination LU2 ‚Č• LU1 and the ‚ąöZ‚āā ‚äÜ Z‚āĀ forcing are structural.

### O116 ‚ÄĒ THE 0/1 PACKING LAW RESOLVED BOTH WAYS: complement closure gives the TWO-SIDED span law (necessity, formalized), and the CRT obstruction REFUTES its sufficiency ‚ÄĒ the realizable mass set is pinned between (fable lane, 2026-06-10)

O112's named open (i) ‚ÄĒ the 0/1 packing characterization ‚ÄĒ attacked falsify-first and resolved into a theorem + a refutation. `WindowMassSpan.lean` +4 theorems (9 total in file, all axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, 0 sorry, 0 warnings):

* `full_range_pow_sum_eq_zero` + `complement_window_vanishes` ‚ÄĒ **COMPLEMENT CLOSURE** (any modulus): the full range `[0,n)` kills every window power sum (`1 ‚Č§ j < n`), so the window fiber is closed under complement ‚ÄĒ `S ‚ąą F_n(t) ‚üļ [0,n)‚ąĖS ‚ąą F_n(t)`.
* `window_mass_two_sided_two_prime` ‚ÄĒ **THE TWO-SIDED SPAN LAW** (necessity): at `n = p^a¬∑q^b`, a window-`t`-vanishing 0/1 set has BOTH `|S|` and `n‚ąí|S|` expressible as sums of divisors `> t`. Strictly stronger than O107's one-sided spectrum.
* **The `66`-tooth** (`n = 72`, `t = 9`): weight `66 = 12+18+36` IS a divisor sum, yet `72‚ąí66 = 6` is not ‚üĻ weight 66 IMPOSSIBLE ‚ÄĒ invisible to every one-sided bound; kernel-checked via the 6-element complement violating the min weight 12.
* `two_sided_not_sufficient` ‚ÄĒ **THE CRT REFUTATION**: at `(n,t) = (36,3)`, mass `13` passes the two-sided test (`13 = 9+4`, `23 = 9+6+4+4`) yet NO window-3-vanishing 0/1 set has 13 elements: the only divisor rep of 13 is `{9,4}`, and a `őľ_9`-coset (step 4) and `őľ_4`-coset (step 9) have coprime steps ‚ÄĒ CRT forces intersection. Proof extracts the packets (parity: odd sum ‚üĻ a 9-packet; remainder 4 ‚üĻ a 4-packet) and exhibits the explicit CRT witness `x = (9r + 28r') % 36 ‚ąą P‚āČ ‚ą© P‚āĄ` (omega discharges all mod bookkeeping), contradicting disjointness.

**Falsify-first** (`probe_window_packing_law.py`, exit 0, exhaustive n ‚ąą {12,18,20,24,36}, all t): necessity holds everywhere; the CRT stratum (two-sided-but-unrealizable masses) at `(36,3)` is exactly `{13, 17, 19, 23}` (complement-symmetric, as forced); the naive tiling claim is ALSO false ‚ÄĒ `{4,3,3,2}` does not tile `‚Ą§_12` (parity invariant: 3x + 2y = 4 unsolvable over the class capacities).

**Where the packing surface now stands, sharply:** realizable masses sit STRICTLY between the two-sided span (proven necessary) and disjoint-packing feasibility (the exact object). The remaining open content is the class-capacity combinatorics ‚ÄĒ for two generators: `a` őľ_d-cosets + `b` őľ_d'-cosets pack iff `‚ĆąaG/s‚ĆČ + ‚ĆąbG/s'‚ĆČ ‚Č§ G` (`s = n/d`, `s' = n/d'`, `G = gcd(s,s')`; same-class cosets of coprime-quotient steps always collide) ‚ÄĒ Berger‚ÄďFelzenbaum‚ÄďFraenkel lattice-parallelotope / Korec natural-DCS territory, finite per `(n,t)`. Named next: (a) the two-generator capacity law as a theorem (the first sufficiency rung); (b) the general criterion at two-prime `n` (BFF-natural systems); (c) the per-mass fiber count (O111's weighted analogue).

### O117 ‚ÄĒ the WINDOW FIBER-COUNT LAW lands in Lean: the block-trace iff on the O106 predicate ‚ÄĒ F_n(t) ‚ČÖ F_m(t)^(n/m) at set level (the O111 Lean layer; nubs, 2026-06-10; renumbered from O116 ‚ÄĒ it raced the fable lane's packing-law O116)

`WindowFiberCount.lean` (axiom-clean √ó5, 0 sorry, 0 warnings, namespace `DeBruijnWindowedLaw`): O107's named next (ii), the probe layer O111 made exact, now a theorem.

* `isWindowCosetUnion_iff_traceBlocks` ‚ÄĒ **the headline**: under the abstract interface (H) ‚ÄĒ `m ‚ą£ n` and every divisor `d ‚ą£ n` with `d > t` has `gcd(d, m) > t` (the property O111 verified for `m = lcm(Dmin)`) ‚ÄĒ `S ‚äÜ [0,n)` is a window coset union at level `n` ‚üļ ALL `n/m` block traces `{e/g : e ‚ąą S, e ‚Č° c (mod g)}` are window coset unions at level `m`. Since a set is determined by its block traces, this IS the set-level bijection `F_n(t) ‚ČÖ F_m(t)^(n/m)` behind O70's exact count law (10‚Ā∂ = |F_6(1)|‚Ā∂ at n = 36 etc.).
* `traceBlock_cosetOf` ‚ÄĒ **the key structural lemma**: the block trace of a canonical `őľ_d`-coset is empty or a canonical `őľ_{gcd(d,m)}`-coset at level `m`. Engine: canonical cosets ARE residue classes in `[0,n)` (`mem_cosetOf_iff_mod`); the trace condition is the linear congruence `g¬∑e' ‚Č° r ‚ąí c (mod n/d)`, whose solution classes have modulus `(n/d)/gcd(g, n/d)`; and the DIVISOR IDENTITY `(n/d)¬∑gcd(d,m) = m¬∑gcd(n/m, n/d)` ‚ÄĒ both sides are `gcd(n, (n/d)¬∑m)` by `gcd_mul_left` twice, zero division pain ‚ÄĒ pins that modulus as the level-`m` step `m/gcd(d,m)`.
* `isWindowCosetUnion_traceBlock` / `isWindowCosetUnion_of_traceBlocks` ‚ÄĒ the two directions: traces of disjoint cosets stay disjoint (preimage injectivity); lifts `e' ‚Ü¶ c + g¬∑e'` send level-`m` cosets to canonical level-`n` cosets with the SAME divisor (`liftBlock_cosetOf`: `g¬∑(m/d') = n/d'`), cross-block disjointness by residues, per-block choice via `choose`.
* Congruence engine extracted (`trace_congr`/`trace_congr_mem`): `Nat.ModEq.mul_left_cancel'` + `cancel_left_of_coprime` after factoring the gcd ‚ÄĒ reusable for any future block-collapse argument.

Double counting (`Finset.sum_comm` after `card_filter`), the generic count per codeword, `card_polysDegLT` for the codeword total. The mean coset list size `E_u[‚Ąď(u, w)] = q^{k‚ąín}¬∑ő£_{j ‚Č• n‚ąíw} C(n,j)(q‚ąí1)^{n‚ąíj}` is now a corollary-shaped consequence.

**Where this aims:** with M1 in-tree, the O120 reframing is half-formal: domain-independence of the FIRST moment is a theorem; M2 (through the distance distribution) is the next named brick (needs the MDS weight enumerator in-tree ‚ÄĒ itself a worthy classical target); Chebyshev via M2 would give the first machine-checked nontrivial max-list bound. őī*'s domain-dependence provably cannot appear before the second moment.

### O113 ‚ÄĒ the UNIVERSAL window endpoint: full window ‚üĻ ‚ąÖ/full at EVERY modulus ‚ÄĒ the assembly question bracketed from above

`FullWindowDichotomy.lean` (axiom-clean): `full_window_dichotomy` ‚ÄĒ at EVERY modulus `n` (no prime-structure hypothesis), `T ‚äÜ őľ_n` with power sums vanishing on the whole window `1 ‚Č§ j < n` is `‚ąÖ` or all of `őľ_n`. Discrete Fourier orthogonality: the double sum `ő£_{j<n} ő£_{e‚ąąS} ő∂^{j(e+n‚ąíe‚āÄ)}` is `n¬∑ūĚüô_S(e‚āÄ)` summed `e`-first (off-diagonal geometric sums die; the divisibility pinch `n ‚ą£ e+(n‚ąíe‚āÄ) ‚üļ e = e‚āÄ` inside `(0, 2n)`) and `|S|` summed `j`-first (the window kills every `j ‚Č† 0` row through the O97 bridge) ‚ÄĒ so the indicator is constant.

**The three-prime window hierarchy is now machine-checked at three strata**: `t = 1` (O109 ‚Ąö-components), single gcd-exponents (O112 fiber-count laws with positivity), and `t = n‚ąí1` (this dichotomy) ‚ÄĒ with the coset-form intermediate strata provably DEAD (O111). The open window content is exactly the interpolation between O112's per-exponent count laws and this endpoint: which sub-full windows force which closure ‚ÄĒ with both ends and the obstruction formalized, the question is now a precise interpolation problem rather than an unformed one.

### O114 ‚ÄĒ the partial-DFT closure law: the dense window {j : p ‚ą§ j} EXACTLY characterizes őľ_p-closure at EVERY modulus ‚ÄĒ the first intermediate stratum past two primes

`PartialDFTClosure.lean` (axiom-clean √ó3): `partial_dft_mu_p_closed` ‚ÄĒ for any prime `p ‚ą£ n`, power sums vanishing at every `1 ‚Č§ j < n` with `p ‚ą§ j` force `őľ_p`-closure of `T ‚äÜ őľ_n`; with O97's converse, an exact iff (`partial_dft_iff`). Fourier mechanism: `dft_point_mass` (the phased row sums recover the indicator, `ő£_j (ő∂^{n‚ąía})^j¬∑S_j = n¬∑ūĚüô_T(ő∂^a)` ‚ÄĒ the O113 double sum factored as a reusable lemma) compared at `e‚āÄ` and `(e‚āÄ + n/p) % n`: the `p ‚ą£ j` rows carry equal phases unconditionally (`p¬∑e‚āĀ ‚Č° p¬∑e‚āÄ [MOD n]`, with the inverse-free cancellation `ő∂^{X}¬∑ő∂^{pua} = 1` at both points), the `p ‚ą§ j` rows die by the window; membership is shift-invariant, iterate.

**The window hierarchy at `n = pqr` now has machine-checked content at FOUR strata**: t=1 ‚Ąö-components (O109), single gcd-exponents (O112 nonneg counts), dense coprime-complement windows (this ‚ÄĒ at n=30, all odd j force antipodal closure; all 3‚ą§j force őľ‚āÉ-closure; all 5‚ą§j force őľ‚āÖ-closure), and the full window (O113) ‚ÄĒ coset strata dead (O111). **The open interpolation is now pinned between explicit formalized bounds**: the dense window (ŌÜ-complement size, sufficient ‚ÄĒ this) versus single exponents (O112, count-level only) ‚ÄĒ the open question is the SPARSE sufficient window at 3+ primes, whose two-prime answer {q^c} (O97) used the packet mechanism O105 removed. Note the dense law also gives a SECOND proof route for O97-type closure at any modulus when the full coprime-complement window is available ‚ÄĒ the two-prime sparse law remains strictly stronger on its turf.
### O115 ‚ÄĒ THE GENERAL-t WINDOWED LAW, q-DIRECTION: windowed_coset_cover_q (the reassembly induction COMPLETE)

őľ_{q^{m+1}}-covered** ‚ÄĒ the complete d-coset reassembly in the q-direction at every

Proof = the induction the arc was built for: full export (orbit + dichotomy + complete

### O118 ‚ÄĒ THE BIGRADED WALL DISSOLVES: syndrome resolution by valuation induction (route, complete)

The all-t law's blocking system (one mixed identity, two spectrum unknowns per exponent
‚ÄĒ O117's wall) RESOLVES. The engine, now precisely mapped:

1. PURE-POWER nested syndromes always resolve: a spectrum R's pure p-power syndrome
   ő£_R r^{p^j} unwinds via R's OWN p-side transfer (q ‚ą§ p^{j-1} ‚ÄĒ valid) down to plain
   sums of deeper spectra = S-window values at product exponents ‚Č§ t. Symmetrically for
   pure q-powers via q-descents.
2. MIXED nested syndromes resolve by INDUCTION ON THE p-ADIC VALUATION: for R's mixed
   exponent e = q^őĪ p^ő≤ (őĪ, ő≤ ‚Č• 1), S's mixed identity p¬∑ő£_{T_S} ŌĄ^{qe/p} + q¬∑ő£_R r^e =
   ő£_S y^{qe} = 0 (qe ‚Č§ t, FULL window) links R's unknown to T_S's at exponent
   q^{őĪ+1} p^{ő≤‚ąí1} ‚ÄĒ valuation drops by one. At ő≤ = 1 the partner is PURE q^{őĪ+1},
   resolved independently by (1), which PINS the mixed unknown. Regress terminates.
3. CONSEQUENCE: every nested spectrum inherits the FULL window scaled by its descent
   multiplier (q^{#q-steps} p^{#p-steps}¬∑ő£_U u^e = resolved S-syndromes). The J(t)
   induction then runs with full windows at every level ‚ÄĒ my proven q-direction law's
   skeleton with no puncture ‚ÄĒ yielding THE COMPLETE O70 LAW: window [1,t] ‚üĻ every
   element őľ_d-covered, d | n, d > t, at ALL t.

Formal shape: strong induction on (descent depth, p-adic valuation of exponent),
mutually through the nested spectra; the first_peel (O116) and full export machinery
carry the per-element coverage exactly as in windowed_coset_cover_q. The alternating-
induction and pointwise-weld doors stay closed (recorded); THIS is the open road.
Formalization = the next arc (nested-spectrum invariant + the valuation induction +
re-run of the J-induction); every constituent pattern already exists in
DeBruijnTwoPrime.lean.

`DeBruijnTwoPrime.packetUnion_bilateral_export` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry; my lane): one

### O123 ‚ÄĒ THE SUBDIVISION ENGINE: canonical cosets split into canonical sub-cosets ‚ÄĒ the natural-DCS splitting rung at full generality, both tree directions now machine-checked (fable lane, 2026-06-10)

The constructive engine of the packing tree program (O122's named next). `PackingSubdivision.lean` (4 lemmas + kernel-checked teeth, axiom-clean √ó4 ‚ÄĒ `step_identity` is even pure-`[propext]` ‚ÄĒ 0 sorry, 0 warnings):

* `step_identity` ‚ÄĒ the modulus bookkeeping `n/(d/u) = u¬∑(n/d)` for `u ‚ą£ d ‚ą£ n`.
* `cosetOf_subdivide` ‚ÄĒ **the splitting identity**: `cosetOf n d r = ‚čÉ_{i<u} cosetOf n (d/u) (r + i¬∑(n/d))` ‚ÄĒ a canonical `őľ_d`-coset is the union of `u` canonical `őľ_{d/u}`-cosets, for ANY `u ‚ą£ d` (digit split `j = j%u + u¬∑(j/u)`).
* `subdivide_parts_disjoint` + `isPacket_subdivide` ‚ÄĒ the parts are pairwise disjoint and the split is an `IsPacket`-family statement: a `őľ_d`-packet is a disjoint union of exactly `u` canonical `őľ_{d/u}`-packets.
* Tooth: `cosetOf 12 6 1 = ‚čÉ_{i<3} cosetOf 12 2 (1+2i)` and `= {1,3,5,7,9,11}`, kernel-checked.

**Both directions of the natural-DCS splitting tree are now theorems**: O106's `isPacket_merge` (a packet of fattened bases merges into one bigger coset) is the upward rung; this is the downward rung. Consequence: any TREE-REALIZABLE modulus multiset (recursive prime splitting from the root) yields an explicit packing by iterating `cosetOf_subdivide` ‚ÄĒ the constructive half of the candidate exact `k`-generator law (`probe_packing_tree_law.py`: packable ‚üļ the completed multiset `{n/d √ó a_d} ‚ą™ {n}^{n‚ąívol}` is tree-realizable; Berger‚ÄďFelzenbaum‚ÄďFraenkel naturality is the necessity side, the genuinely open research half).
### O121 ‚ÄĒ O118's INHERITANCE STEP REFUTED (own-route falsification) + the corrected road

Falsify-first applied to my own O118 route before formalizing it:

* THE GAP (found by hand): the valuation induction's base case fails as linear algebra ‚ÄĒ
  the two mixed identities at S-exponent pq (q-side at e = p; p-side at e' = q) are THE
  SAME EQUATION: the pair (ő£_R r^p, ő£_T ŌĄ^q) is genuinely underdetermined by S's
  syndromes alone.
* THE REFUTATION (numerical probe, docs/kb/mixed-tower-probes/inherit_probe.py): window
  inheritance FullWindow R q t is FALSE for general decompositions ‚ÄĒ S = őľ‚āĀ‚āā (full
  window through t = 11!) admits MIXED decompositions (2- and 3-packets interleaved)
  whose spectra violate the inherited window: ő£_R r¬≥ ‚Č† 0, ő£_T ŌĄ¬≤ ‚Č† 0. Spectrum windows
  are DECOMPOSITION-DEPENDENT.
* THE ILLUMINATION: őľ‚āĀ‚āā's PURE decompositions inherit perfectly (all-2-packets ‚üĻ R = őľ‚āÜ
  exactly, all windows ‚úď). Inheritance is a property of ADAPTED decompositions, not all.
* THE CORRECTED ROAD: the J(t) induction must run per-element with CHOSEN decompositions
  ‚ÄĒ exactly the first_peel_export resource (O116): peel the element's own orbit first
  and control the spectrum along ITS chain only. The bilateral export (O119/O120) stays
  valid and useful (the identities are true; only universal window inheritance dies).
  Corrected next brick: the adapted-decomposition spectrum-window lemma ‚ÄĒ what window
  does the FIRST-PEELED spectrum inherit along the peeled element's chain?

### O122 ‚ÄĒ ADAPTED INHERITANCE CONFIRMED (349/349): the corrected road is empirically sound

Probes (docs/kb/mixed-tower-probes/adapted_probe.py, adapted36.py): for EVERY windowed S

into X^d ‚ąí ő≥ factors, d > t) ‚ÄĒ classical in flavor, possibly cleaner. Both are genuine

### O116 ‚ÄĒ LAM‚ÄďLEUNG REDUCED TO MINIMAL VANISHING SUMS: the positivity kernel isolated

`MinimalVanishingReduction.lean` (axiom-clean √ó4, Mathlib-only): `exists_minimal_vanishing_subweight` (every nonzero vanishing ‚Ąē-weight dominates a minimal one ‚ÄĒ strong induction on the total), `span_of_minimal_span` (peel minimal sums; differences of vanishing weights vanish; totals strictly drop), `lam_leung_iff_minimal` (the ‚Ąē-span law ‚üļ its restriction to MINIMAL weights). The O105 witness is such a minimal sum (weight 6 = 3+3 ‚úď in span, as predicted).

### O123 ‚ÄĒ THE SET-FORM LAW + ALIVE-TRACE DETERMINATION: the two-prime budget mechanism below p

Two theorems (axiom-clean, 0 sorry; my lane), the counting payoff of O117:

* `windowed_eq_union_alive_below_p` ‚ÄĒ the set-form law: every element of a windowed set

With O117 (coverage), O123 (determination), and the O70 tables (exact counts), the

### O124 ‚ÄĒ COVERAGE MONOTONICITY + the upgrade question pinned (the above-p gap, exact)

`coverage_mono` (axiom-clean, 5 lines): őľ_d-coverage implies őľ_{d'}-coverage for every
d' ‚ą£ d ‚ÄĒ the laws' certificates form a DIVISOR IDEAL at each element.

THE SHARPENED GAP (analysis): windowed_coset_cover_q's existential (‚ąÉ c ‚Č§ m,
őľ_{q^c¬∑p}-cov) certifies SOME point of the ideal, not its maximum; the all-t law asks

the all-t law but don't yet force it. THE MISSING ENGINE, exactly: the UPGRADE ‚ÄĒ

the two remaining objects are CLOSER KIN than they appeared: both are valued-fold
structure questions. One frontier, not two.

### O125 ‚ÄĒ THE VALUED 2-POWER WINDOWED LAW: the multiplicity door opens

`LamLeungTwoPow.windowed_coeff_congr_invariant` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry; my lane): a
‚Ąö-coefficient vector on őľ_{2^(m+1)}-exponents whose 2-POWER WINDOW {2^0, ‚Ä¶, 2^k}
vanishes is INVARIANT on exponent classes modulo 2^(m‚ąík) ‚ÄĒ the VALUED analogue of
full_tower, by induction on k: the j = 0 relation gives antipodal symmetry (O74), the
folded vector c‚āĀ(s) = 2¬∑c(s) inherits the shallower window at the halved level
(fold-of-window identity), and the inductive congruence-invariance pulls back through
antipodal reduction.

WHY THIS MATTERS ‚ÄĒ the unified frontier (O124) just yielded its base case from the
multiplicity door: INTEGER multiplicity vectors (contracted folds of windowed sets;
branch-weight profiles of windowed valued errors) at 2-power levels are CONSTANT on
őľ_{2^{k+1}}-coset classes. Consequences queued: (i) branch-weight profiles of deep
windowed errors on 2-power towers are coset-constant ‚ÄĒ a RIGIDITY constraint directly
on the branch-count program's objects; (ii) the contracted-fold upgrade at full-q
contractions (two-prime side) now has its target lemma. The window {2^j} is SPARSE
(only k+1 exponents for a 2^{m‚ąík}-resolution conclusion ‚ÄĒ exponentially fewer than the
full window): the valued law is stronger than its subset shadow.

### O126 ‚ÄĒ CONTRACTED MULTIPLICITY RIGIDITY: the first formal constraint on the branch objects

Two theorems (axiom-clean, 0 sorry; my lane):

* `contraction_fiber_sum` ‚ÄĒ power sums of S at 2^s-scaled exponents equal the
  multiplicity-weighted power sums of the 2^s-contraction (the fiber filters partition
  S; per-fiber terms are constant).
* `contracted_multiplicity_invariant` ‚ÄĒ **for a set with the scaled 2-power window, the
  contraction's fiber-count function is invariant on exponent classes mod 2^(m‚ąís‚ąík)** ‚ÄĒ
  O125 applied to the integer multiplicity vector that the contraction lays over the
  domain.

THE MEANING: at every depth s of the 2-adic tower, a windowed set's fold-multiplicity
profile is COSET-CONSTANT ‚ÄĒ the branch-count program's central objects (how mass
distributes over contracted domains) now carry a machine-checked rigidity law. The
program's two doors now have: the valued law (O125), the multiplicity rigidity (O126),
the all-words fold/mass/window laws (O56‚ÄďO59), and the complete subset theory ‚ÄĒ the
branch-count question is surrounded on every side by formal structure, with the count
distribution itself the remaining open core.

### O127 ‚ÄĒ THE SPARSE TOWER THEOREM: full_tower from exponentially fewer conditions

`LamLeungTwoPow.full_tower_sparse` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry; my lane): the 2-POWER window
{2^0, ‚Ä¶, 2^k} ALONE (k+1 conditions) forces őľ_{2^(k+1)}-closure ‚ÄĒ the same conclusion
full_tower drew from the full window [1, 2^(k+1)) (2^(k+1) ‚ąí 1 conditions). Proof: O126
at depth s = 0 (the indicator is its own multiplicity vector; rigidity makes it
invariant mod 2^(m‚ąík); the őľ_{2^(k+1)}-roots are exactly the ő∂^{2^(m‚ąík)}-powers, and
invariance transfers membership along them).

SIGNIFICANCE: (i) the session's first pillar strengthened exponentially in hypothesis
by its newest theorem ‚ÄĒ the valued door immediately repaid the subset theory; (ii) for
the LIST/BUDGET applications, sparse windows mean the unit-syndrome budget (O61) holds
under 2-power-only syndrome conditions ‚ÄĒ a much weaker verifier obligation; (iii) the
non-2-power window exponents are REDUNDANT for the fiber structure at 2-power domains ‚ÄĒ
a fact the O70 tables hinted at (plateaus) and is now a theorem.

### O128 ‚ÄĒ THE SPARSE BUDGET: 2^{#classes} from k+1 syndrome conditions (sparse_tower_count)

`LamLeungTwoPow.sparse_tower_count` (axiom-clean, 0 sorry, first-try compile): the

### O129 ‚ÄĒ THE INCIDENCE LABORATORY: the exactness theorem + the first measurements of the sole surviving channel (nubs, 2026-06-10)

Scope claimed as the complement of lalalune's 07:11Z lane 2 (comment 4667894636): dense

**THE EXACTNESS THEOREM (computational char-0 proof, second-seat audited):** over
‚Ą§[ő∂‚āÉ‚āā], every witness‚Äďdense difference vanishes on őľ‚āÉ‚āā exactly on T_w ‚ą© T_t. At a
split prime the law holds iff p divides none of 13,219 explicit norms (all < 2.2¬∑10¬≤‚Āī);
BabyBear and 3¬∑2¬≥‚Āį+1 divide none ‚ÄĒ proven twice. NOT anatomy-forced: fails at all 20
split primes 97..2113 at the generic ~6.7/p rate, counterexamples explicit; the
certificate's bad-prime predictions match the sweep failures exactly. Structural
lemmas (the e_w-even lever, d = P(x¬≤)+x¬∑Q(x¬≤), Q = ‚ąíe‚āÉ¬∑F): dense words have e‚āÉ ‚Č† 0;
a full fiber dies iff z ‚ąą S ‚ą© B ‚ÄĒ **the cross-pair incidence geometry IS the
intersection lattice of the 35 fiber-subsets with the 580 B-blocks**; accidental
collisions are always single zeros with live partner (0 dead-fiber accidents in
~10,800 observed extras across 20 primes).

**Measurements (gates passed; run-2 reproduces run-1 exactly on the deterministic
census):** cross 35√ó1344: zero excess 47,040/47,040; 4,072 distinct L1 dead loci,
mean multiplicity 11.55, max 144 ‚ÄĒ the union bound's loss, measured for the first
time; multiplicity menu low-mass concentrated at {2,4} (the menu's fourth appearance)
with a rich even tail. Dense-dense (12,000 sample): excess ‚Čą 0.2% ‚ÄĒ exact cyclotomic
identities (pairs sharing two q-roots collide at their antipodes), identified
per-pair; 32 pairs have EMPTY L1 locus; all 672 negation pairs drop a full tower

**Where this leaves the channel:** the witness‚Äďdense incidence is now COMBINATORIAL

### O124 ‚ÄĒ THE MULTISET (‚Ąē) WINDOW LAW: trichotomy resolved by probe + CJ counterexample

Hypothesis A4 (docs/wiki/open-math-hypotheses-2026-06.md) asked whether the windowed coset law
lifts from Z-weights to ‚Ąē-weights (multisets): window 1..t vanishing ‚üĻ ‚Ąē-union of full
ő≥¬∑őľ_d cosets, d | n, d > t. Resolution (probes: /tmp/hypA4_probe.py, /tmp/hypA4_cj.py):

* **GENERAL n: FALSE.** The Conway‚ÄďJones (5:6)-type minimal sum at n = 30 ‚ÄĒ multiset
  {ő∂‚āÉ‚āÄ^25, ő∂‚āÉ‚āÄ^5, ő∂‚āÉ‚āÄ^6, ő∂‚āÉ‚āÄ^12, ő∂‚āÉ‚āÄ^18, ő∂‚āÉ‚āÄ^24} (= ‚ąíő∂‚āÉ ‚ąí ő∂‚āÉ¬≤ + ő∂‚āÖ + ő∂‚āÖ¬≤ + ő∂‚āÖ¬≥ + ő∂‚āÖ‚Āī) ‚ÄĒ
  has p‚āĀ = 0, is MINIMAL (no vanishing subsum, verified exhaustively), and is NOT
  ‚Ąē-decomposable into full cosets (verified by backtracking). The Z-law (O111) survives
  because Z-decompositions may use negative coefficients; the ‚Ąē-gap is exactly the
  Lam‚ÄďLeung positivity kernel (O116). **A4-general ‚Č° K5: same problem.**
* **PRIME POWERS n = p^k: TRUE in all probes** (n = 8: t = 1,2,3, 49+5+5 windowed multisets,
  0 counterexamples; n = 9: t = 1,2, 7+7, 0). Proof skeleton mapped: the tower power basis
  1, ő∂, ‚Ä¶, ő∂^{p‚ąí1} over ‚Ąö(ő∂_{p^{k‚ąí1}}) (X^p ‚ąí ő∂_{p^{k‚ąí1}} minimal) forces per-fiber p_m
  vanishing for p ‚ą§ m; the p | m window equations are cross-fiber mixed and force
  RECOMBINATION of pulled-back small cosets into full larger cosets (e.g. at n = 8, t = 2:
  two antipodal pairs {j, j+4} ‚ą™ {j+2, j+6} recombine into the full ő≥őľ‚āĄ). This is the
  adapted-decomposition phenomenon (O122) in its clean single-prime form ‚ÄĒ no dead-coset
  stall at prime powers. **FRI/STIR-relevant: smooth domains are exactly őľ_{2^k}.**
* **TWO PRIMES p^a q^b: TRUE in probes** (n = 12: t = 1,2, 88+16, 0 counterexamples) ‚ÄĒ open,
  and by the above identification it IS the O116 minimal-sum kernel restricted to two primes,
  where Conway‚ÄďJones minimal sums are exactly the scaled full-coset relations (no exotic
  minimal sums below three primes ‚ÄĒ consistent with the in-tree two-prime completeness).

Corrected A4 (the formalization target): **the prime-power multiset window law**, with the
two-prime case conditional on K5 and the 3-prime case FALSE as stated (needs the Lam‚ÄďLeung
weight-bound correction). The A3 boundary-counting bridge only needs the prime-power case.

### O130 ‚ÄĒ THE GENERAL RUNG LAW: the O108 antipodal-balance engine derives every 2-power scale; blind n=64 forecast survives two independent enumerations; the r=5 stratum TURN-ON falsifies "marginal = (s/2‚ąí1,3)" as a law (nubs, 2026-06-10)

  r = 3), L4/L6 hold for all odd r, so `marginal(s) = 2¬∑ő£_{r odd‚Č•3} N_r(s)` with N_r per-s
  finite censuses. N‚āÉ structure (L1 parity-purity, complete E1‚ÄďE4 taxonomy, the 13-type
  universal node geometry h/v/k/ŌÉ) proven general; machine-asserted identical at s = 8/16/32.
* **The engine re-derives C19's 16 at s = 8 with NO fix** (exact (B,O,ŌÉ) set equality vs a
  fresh full C(16,9) field census) ‚ÄĒ and what calibration killed is instructive: the
  "perfect 7√ó8 split" and "pairwise = m" census patterns are m = 8 coincidences, not law.
* **Blind n=64 forecast vs truth: EXACT.** r=3 stratum forecast 764,544 classes / 1,529,088

  codewords agree-exactly-33 + 50/50 negative controls fail; 24+24 audit samples at two

* **THE FINDING ‚ÄĒ strata turn on with s:** N‚āÖ(8) = N‚āÖ(16) = 0 but **N‚āÖ(32) = 99,512**
  (pattern (14,5); 199,024 elements) ‚ÄĒ the verifier's r=3-only "total" was the incomplete

* **Level-4 anchors (corrected s=64 kernel, Python-revalidated):** N‚āÉ(64) =
  244,593,584,640; N‚āÖ(64) = 141,450,979,280; N‚āÖ/N‚āÉ grows 0 ‚Üí 0 ‚Üí 0.13 ‚Üí 0.58, so
  marginal(128-domain) ‚Č• 772,089,127,840 is a LOWER bound ‚ÄĒ r ‚Č• 7 plausibly activates.

**Honest residuals:** (1) the r ‚Č• 13 tail at s = 32 is unswept (‚Č• 1.4√ó10¬Ļ¬≤ configs) ‚ÄĒ the
